text:
is a member of the Military Police and a superior officer stationed in the Stohess District.

Appearance

Dennis has medium-length messy light-colored hair and a slight stubble. He wears the standard Military Police uniform.

Story

Wall Sheena, Goodbye

Sometime before the Survey Corps' 57th expedition beyond the Walls, Dennis briefs Marlowe, Hitch and Annie on an illegal drug known as Coderoin. He is informed that the drug has only recently been introduced to Stohess District. He learns that any soldier that confiscates enough of it will receive a special bonus.
